query:
-- 查询partners表中陈治霖的记录
SELECT id, name, phone FROM partners WHERE phone = '15321700153';

-- 查询partner_cities表中partnerId=30002的记录
SELECT pc.*, c.name as cityName 
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002;

-- 查询所有partner_cities记录，看看是否有其他partnerId
SELECT pc.partnerId, p.name, p.phone, c.name as cityName, pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.phone = '15321700153';
